mapper.insert: insert into t_communicate_memory (memory_no, begin_time, end_time, communicate_duration, memory_owner, memory_place, memory_place_detail, memory_images, memory_source, row_memory_no, communicator_relation, communicator, communicate_type, communicate_way, communicate_content) values (#{memoryNo}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{communicateDuration}, #{memoryOwner}, #{memoryPlace}, #{memoryPlaceDetail}, #{memoryImages}, #{memorySource}, #{rowMemoryNo}, #{communicatorRelation}, #{communicator}, #{communicateType}, #{communicateWay}, #{communicateContent})
mapper.delete:
delete from t_communicate_memory where id in
#{item}
